content: Great to meet you, Roy! Could you please let me know your age?
Could you please provide your email address?
Could you please provide your phone number?
Could you please let me know which country you are from? Your options are India, Japan, or China.
Could you please let me know which state you are in? Your options are Beijing or Guangdong.
What district do you live in? You can choose either Chaoyang or Haidian.
Could you please let me know your ward? You can choose between Ward1 and Ward2.
What type of account would you like to open? You can choose from Savings, Current, or Fixed Deposit.
